message:
rename: supervised-agent → hive across all files

Renames all systemd unit files, launchd plists, config paths, and source references from supervised-agent to hive to match install.sh branding. Fixes install.sh failure when running sudo ./install.sh.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ sudo apt install tmux
 curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kubestellar/hive/main/install.sh | sudo bash
 
 # 3. configure
-sudo nano /etc/supervised-agent/hive.conf
+sudo nano /etc/hive/hive.conf
 
 # 4. start
 hive supervisor
@@ -88,7 +88,7 @@ The **kick-governor** measures issue and PR backlog across your repos every 15 m
 
 Architect and outreach are **opportunistic** — they fill idle cycles and pause entirely under load. Supervisor runs every 30 min regardless of mode.
 
-Cadences are tunable in `/etc/supervised-agent/governor.env` — no restart needed.
+Cadences are tunable in `/etc/hive/governor.env` — no restart needed.
 
 ---
 
@@ -131,7 +131,7 @@ hive sends alerts to any combination of ntfy, Slack, and Discord. Set whichever
 
 ## Config
 
-`/etc/supervised-agent/hive.conf` — the only file you need to edit:
+`/etc/hive/hive.conf` — the only file you need to edit:
 
 ```bash
 # Repos to watch (space-separated)

@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 #
 # Source this file, then call: notify "<title>" "<body>" [priority]
 #
-# Reads from environment (set in /etc/supervised-agent/hive.conf or governor.env):
+# Reads from environment (set in /etc/hive/hive.conf or governor.env):
 #   NTFY_TOPIC      - ntfy.sh topic (free push to phone/desktop)
 #   NTFY_SERVER     - ntfy server (default: https://ntfy.sh)
 #   SLACK_WEBHOOK   - Slack incoming webhook URL

@@ -1,10 +1,10 @@
-# /etc/supervised-agent/agent.env
+# /etc/hive/agent.env
 #
-# Configuration for the supervised-agent runtime. systemd loads this file via
+# Configuration for the hive runtime. systemd loads this file via
 # EnvironmentFile= for every unit. Change any value, then either:
-#   sudo systemctl stop supervised-agent && \
+#   sudo systemctl stop hive && \
 #   sudo -u "$AGENT_USER" tmux kill-session -t "$AGENT_SESSION_NAME"; \
-#   sudo systemctl start supervised-agent
+#   sudo systemctl start hive
 # (plain `systemctl restart` alone doesn't force a session respawn — tmux
 # outlives the supervisor, so the new supervisor sees a "healthy" old session
 # and does nothing.)
@@ -39,12 +39,12 @@ AGENT_LOOP_PROMPT="You are in EXECUTOR MODE — no self-scheduling, no /loop cro
 # Absolute path the agent appends its heartbeat to. Healthcheck watches this
 # file's mtime. The agent MUST write to it on every iteration (put that
 # requirement in your policy file).
-AGENT_LOG_FILE=/home/dev/.local/state/supervised-agent/heartbeat.log
+AGENT_LOG_FILE=/home/dev/.local/state/hive/heartbeat.log
 
 # ---- OPTIONAL ---------------------------------------------------------------
 
 # tmux session name.
-AGENT_SESSION_NAME=supervised-agent
+AGENT_SESSION_NAME=hive
 
 # String the supervisor waits for in the pane before sending AGENT_LOOP_PROMPT.
 # For Claude Code v2.x this is the footer hint "bypass permissions on".

@@ -261,8 +261,8 @@ Repos confirmed: `awesome-ai-edge-computing`, `awesome-ai-infrastructure`, `awes
 - One outreach per project — never spam
 - Match the target repo's format exactly (separator style, emoji use, section placement)
 - Never misrepresent KubeStellar's usage of a project
-- Pull latest instructions on every pass: `cd /tmp/supervised-agent && git pull --rebase origin main`
-- Instructions repo: **kubestellar/hive** (was: kubestellar/supervised-agent), local path: `/tmp/supervised-agent`
+- Pull latest instructions on every pass: `cd /tmp/hive && git pull --rebase origin main`
+- Instructions repo: **kubestellar/hive** (was: kubestellar/hive), local path: `/tmp/hive`
 
 ## Self-Update Protocol

@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@
 # See also:
 #   examples/sqlite-state.md     — schema reference and query patterns
 #   examples/kubestellar-fixer.md — full case study using this pattern
-#   launchd/com.supervised-agent.scanner.plist.example — macOS scheduler
+#   launchd/com.hive.scanner.plist.example — macOS scheduler
 
 set -euo pipefail

@@ -1,31 +1,31 @@
 <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
 <!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
 <!--
-  supervised-agent — macOS LaunchAgent
-  Equivalent of supervised-agent.service on Linux.
+  hive — macOS LaunchAgent
+  Equivalent of hive.service on Linux.
 
   Runs bin/agent-supervisor.sh in a loop. The supervisor manages a tmux session
   with the AI agent inside, same as on Linux — only the process manager differs.
 
   Install:
-    cp launchd/com.supervised-agent.plist.example ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.supervised-agent.plist
+    cp launchd/com.hive.plist.example ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.hive.plist
     # Edit paths below (replace /Users/YOURUSER everywhere)
-    launchctl load -w ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.supervised-agent.plist
+    launchctl load -w ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.hive.plist
 
   Uninstall:
-    launchctl unload ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.supervised-agent.plist
-    rm ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.supervised-agent.plist
+    launchctl unload ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.hive.plist
+    rm ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.hive.plist
 -->
 <plist version="1.0">
 <dict>
     <key>Label</key>
-    <string>com.supervised-agent</string>
+    <string>com.hive</string>
 
     <key>ProgramArguments</key>
     <array>
         <string>/opt/homebrew/bin/bash</string>
         <string>-c</string>
-        <string>source /Users/YOURUSER/.config/supervised-agent/agent.env && exec /Users/YOURUSER/supervised-agent/bin/agent-supervisor.sh</string>
+        <string>source /Users/YOURUSER/.config/hive/agent.env && exec /Users/YOURUSER/hive/bin/agent-supervisor.sh</string>
     </array>
 
     <key>WorkingDirectory</key>
@@ -38,10 +38,10 @@
     <true/>
 
     <key>StandardOutPath</key>
-    <string>/Users/YOURUSER/.local/state/supervised-agent/supervisor.log</string>
+    <string>/Users/YOURUSER/.local/state/hive/supervisor.log</string>
 
     <key>StandardErrorPath</key>
-    <string>/Users/YOURUSER/.local/state/supervised-agent/supervisor.err</string>
+    <string>/Users/YOURUSER/.local/state/hive/supervisor.err</string>
 
     <!-- Throttle respawns: wait 30s between crashes -->
     <key>ThrottleInterval</key>

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
 <!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
 <!--
-  supervised-agent scanner — macOS LaunchAgent
+  hive scanner — macOS LaunchAgent
   Fires a standalone scanner script on a fixed schedule.
 
   This is the "hybrid" pattern: a deterministic bash scanner runs on a timer
@@ -12,19 +12,19 @@
   See examples/kubestellar-fixer.md for a full case study.
 
   Install:
-    cp launchd/com.supervised-agent.scanner.plist.example \
-       ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.supervised-agent.scanner.plist
+    cp launchd/com.hive.scanner.plist.example \
+       ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.hive.scanner.plist
     # Edit paths below
-    launchctl load -w ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.supervised-agent.scanner.plist
+    launchctl load -w ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.hive.scanner.plist
 
   Uninstall:
-    launchctl unload ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.supervised-agent.scanner.plist
-    rm ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.supervised-agent.scanner.plist
+    launchctl unload ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.hive.scanner.plist
+    rm ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.hive.scanner.plist
 -->
 <plist version="1.0">
 <dict>
     <key>Label</key>
-    <string>com.supervised-agent.scanner</string>
+    <string>com.hive.scanner</string>
 
     <key>ProgramArguments</key>
     <array>

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+[Unit]
+Description=Hive healthcheck (detect heartbeat stall, respawn, notify)
+Requisite=hive.service
+After=hive.service
+
+[Service]
+Type=oneshot
+User=__AGENT_USER__
+Group=__AGENT_USER__
+EnvironmentFile=/etc/hive/agent.env
+ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/agent-healthcheck.sh

@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 [Unit]
-Description=Run the supervised-agent healthcheck every 20 minutes
+Description=Run the hive healthcheck every 20 minutes
 
 [Timer]
 # First check 5 minutes after boot so the agent has time to come up.
 OnBootSec=5min
 # Then every 20 minutes.
 OnUnitActiveSec=20min
-Unit=supervised-agent-healthcheck.service
+Unit=hive-healthcheck.service
 
 [Install]
 WantedBy=timers.target

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+[Unit]
+Description=Hive healthcheck for instance %i
+Requisite=hive@%i.service
+After=hive@%i.service
+
+[Service]
+Type=oneshot
+User=__AGENT_USER__
+Group=__AGENT_USER__
+EnvironmentFile=/etc/hive/%i.env
+ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/agent-healthcheck.sh

@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+[Unit]
+Description=Run healthcheck for hive instance %i every 20 minutes
+
+[Timer]
+OnBootSec=5min
+OnUnitActiveSec=20min
+Unit=hive-healthcheck@%i.service
+
+[Install]
+WantedBy=timers.target

@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+[Unit]
+Description=Kill the agent tmux session so hive.service re-registers its /loop cron before the TTL expires
+Requisite=hive.service
+After=hive.service
+
+[Service]
+Type=oneshot
+User=__AGENT_USER__
+Group=__AGENT_USER__
+EnvironmentFile=/etc/hive/agent.env
+ExecStart=/bin/sh -c '/usr/bin/tmux kill-session -t "$AGENT_SESSION_NAME" 2>/dev/null || true'
+SuccessExitStatus=0 1

@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@ OnBootSec=5min
 OnUnitActiveSec=6d
 # Stagger in case coordinated hosts all refresh together.
 RandomizedDelaySec=15min
-Unit=supervised-agent-renew.service
+Unit=hive-renew.service
 
 [Install]
 WantedBy=timers.target

@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+[Unit]
+Description=Kill tmux session for instance %i so hive@%i.service re-registers its /loop cron before the TTL expires
+Requisite=hive@%i.service
+After=hive@%i.service
+
+[Service]
+Type=oneshot
+User=__AGENT_USER__
+Group=__AGENT_USER__
+EnvironmentFile=/etc/hive/%i.env
+ExecStart=/bin/sh -c '/usr/bin/tmux kill-session -t "$AGENT_SESSION_NAME" 2>/dev/null || true'
+SuccessExitStatus=0 1

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+[Unit]
+Description=Refresh /loop cron for hive instance %i every 6 days
+
+[Timer]
+OnBootSec=5min
+OnUnitActiveSec=6d
+RandomizedDelaySec=15min
+Unit=hive-renew@%i.service
+
+[Install]
+WantedBy=timers.target

@@ -1,13 +1,13 @@
 [Unit]
-Description=Supervised AI agent (24/7 session with auto-restart)
+Description=Hive agent (24/7 session with auto-restart)
 After=network-online.target
 Wants=network-online.target
 
 [Service]
 Type=simple
 User=__AGENT_USER__
 Group=__AGENT_USER__
-EnvironmentFile=/etc/supervised-agent/agent.env
+EnvironmentFile=/etc/hive/agent.env
 Environment=PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin
 ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/agent-supervisor.sh
 Restart=always

@@ -1,15 +1,15 @@
 [Unit]
-Description=Supervised AI agent %i (24/7 session with auto-restart)
+Description=Hive agent %i (24/7 session with auto-restart)
 After=network-online.target
 Wants=network-online.target
 
 [Service]
 Type=simple
 User=__AGENT_USER__
 Group=__AGENT_USER__
-# Per-instance env file; default to /etc/supervised-agent/<instance>.env.
-# %i is the instance name from supervised-agent@<name>.service.
-EnvironmentFile=/etc/supervised-agent/%i.env
+# Per-instance env file; default to /etc/hive/<instance>.env.
+# %i is the instance name from hive@<name>.service.
+EnvironmentFile=/etc/hive/%i.env
 Environment=PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin
 ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/agent-supervisor.sh
 Restart=always

@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@ Wants=network-online.target
 Type=oneshot
 User=dev
 Environment=PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin
-EnvironmentFile=-/etc/supervised-agent/governor.env
+EnvironmentFile=-/etc/hive/governor.env
 ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/kick-governor.sh
 StandardOutput=journal
 StandardError=journal

@@ -1,11 +0,0 @@
-[Unit]
-Description=Supervised-agent healthcheck (detect heartbeat stall, respawn, notify)
-Requisite=supervised-agent.service
-After=supervised-agent.service
-
-[Service]
-Type=oneshot
-User=__AGENT_USER__
-Group=__AGENT_USER__
-EnvironmentFile=/etc/supervised-agent/agent.env
-ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/agent-healthcheck.sh

@@ -1,11 +0,0 @@
-[Unit]
-Description=Supervised-agent healthcheck for instance %i
-Requisite=supervised-agent@%i.service
-After=supervised-agent@%i.service
-
-[Service]
-Type=oneshot
-User=__AGENT_USER__
-Group=__AGENT_USER__
-EnvironmentFile=/etc/supervised-agent/%i.env
-ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/agent-healthcheck.sh

@@ -1,10 +0,0 @@
-[Unit]
-Description=Run healthcheck for supervised-agent instance %i every 20 minutes
-
-[Timer]
-OnBootSec=5min
-OnUnitActiveSec=20min
-Unit=supervised-agent-healthcheck@%i.service
-
-[Install]
-WantedBy=timers.target

@@ -1,12 +0,0 @@
-[Unit]
-Description=Kill the agent tmux session so supervised-agent.service re-registers its /loop cron before the TTL expires
-Requisite=supervised-agent.service
-After=supervised-agent.service
-
-[Service]
-Type=oneshot
-User=__AGENT_USER__
-Group=__AGENT_USER__
-EnvironmentFile=/etc/supervised-agent/agent.env
-ExecStart=/bin/sh -c '/usr/bin/tmux kill-session -t "$AGENT_SESSION_NAME" 2>/dev/null || true'
-SuccessExitStatus=0 1

@@ -1,12 +0,0 @@
-[Unit]
-Description=Kill tmux session for instance %i so supervised-agent@%i.service re-registers its /loop cron before the TTL expires
-Requisite=supervised-agent@%i.service
-After=supervised-agent@%i.service
-
-[Service]
-Type=oneshot
-User=__AGENT_USER__
-Group=__AGENT_USER__
-EnvironmentFile=/etc/supervised-agent/%i.env
-ExecStart=/bin/sh -c '/usr/bin/tmux kill-session -t "$AGENT_SESSION_NAME" 2>/dev/null || true'
-SuccessExitStatus=0 1

@@ -1,11 +0,0 @@
-[Unit]
-Description=Refresh /loop cron for supervised-agent instance %i every 6 days
-
-[Timer]
-OnBootSec=5min
-OnUnitActiveSec=6d
-RandomizedDelaySec=15min
-Unit=supervised-agent-renew@%i.service
-
-[Install]
-WantedBy=timers.target
